lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਮੁਗਲੁ ਨ ਹੋਆ ਅੰਧਾ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਰਚਾ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: koee mugal na hoaa andhaa kinai na parachaa laaeaa |4|
lines.english: None of the Mugals went blind, and no one performed any miracle. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨ ਮੁਕਾਮ ਜਲੇ ਬਿਜ ਮੰਦਰ ਮੁਛਿ ਮੁਛਿ ਕੁਇਰ ਰੁਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: thaan mukaam jale bij mandar muchh muchh kueir rulaaeaa |
lines.english: He burned the rest-houses and the ancient temples; he cut the princes limb from limb, and cast them into the dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨੑੀ ਤੁਪਕ ਤਾਣਿ ਚਲਾਈ ਓਨੑੀ ਹਸਤਿ ਚਿੜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: onaee tupak taan chalaaee onaee hasat chirraaee |
lines.english: They took aim and fired their guns, and they attacked with their elephants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਗਲ ਪਠਾਣਾ ਭਈ ਲੜਾਈ ਰਣ ਮਹਿ ਤੇਗ ਵਗਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: mugal patthaanaa bhee larraaee ran meh teg vagaaee |
lines.english: The battle raged between the Mugals and the Pat'haans, and the swords clashed on the battlefield.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਹਿੰਦਵਾਣੀ ਅਵਰ ਤੁਰਕਾਣੀ ਭਟਿਆਣੀ ਠਕੁਰਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik hindavaanee avar turakaanee bhattiaanee tthakuraanee |
lines.english: The Hindu women, the Muslim women, the Bhattis and the Rajputs

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਕੀ ਚੀਰੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਟੀ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਮਰਣਾ ਭਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jina kee cheeree daragah paattee tinaa maranaa bhaaee |5|
lines.english: Those men whose letters were torn in the Lord's Court, were destined to die, O Siblings of Destiny. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਕੇ ਬੰਕੇ ਘਰੀ ਨ ਆਇਆ ਤਿਨੑ ਕਿਉ ਰੈਣਿ ਵਿਹਾਣੀ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jina ke banke gharee na aaeaa tina kiau rain vihaanee |6|
lines.english: Their husbands did not return home - how did they pass their night? ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨੑਾ ਪੇਰਣ ਸਿਰ ਖੁਰ ਪਾਟੇ ਇਕਨੑਾ ਵਾਸੁ ਮਸਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa peran sir khur paatte ikanaa vaas masaanee |
lines.english: some had their robes torn away, from head to foot, while others came to dwell in the cremation ground.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਤੇਰੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਹੋਵੈ ਕਿਸ ਥੈ ਜਾਇ ਰੂਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: dukh sukh terai bhaanai hovai kis thai jaae rooaaeeai |
lines.english: Pleasure and pain come by Your Will; unto whom should we go and cry?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae karataa kis no aakh sunaaeeai |
lines.english: The Creator Himself acts, and causes others to act. Unto whom should we complain?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਚਲਾਏ ਵਿਗਸੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੭॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: hukamee hukam chalaae vigasai naanak likhiaa paaeeai |7|12|
lines.english: The Commander issues His Command, and is pleased. O Nanak, we receive what is written in our destiny. ||7||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਕਾਫੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੮ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa kaafee mahalaa 1 ghar 8 asattapadeea |
lines.english: Aasaa, Kaafee, First Mehl, Eighth House, Ashtpadheeyaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੇ ਗੋਇਲਿ ਗੋਇਲੀ ਤੈਸੇ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaise goeil goeilee taise sansaaraa |
lines.english: As the shepherd is in the field for only a short time, so is one in the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਗਹੁ ਜਾਗਹੁ ਸੂਤਿਹੋ ਚਲਿਆ ਵਣਜਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaagahu jaagahu sootiho chaliaa vanajaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Wake up! Wake up! O sleepers, see that the travelling merchant is leaving. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਆਦਮੀ ਬਾਂਧਹਿ ਘਰ ਬਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: koorr kamaaveh aadamee baandheh ghar baaraa |1|
lines.english: Practicing falsehood, they build their homes. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੀ ਓਹੀ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਹੁ ਹੈ ਹੋਸੀ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: ohee ohee kiaa karahu hai hosee soee |
lines.english: Why do you cry out and mourn for the dead? The Lord is, and shall always be.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਤ ਨੀਤ ਘਰ ਬਾਂਧੀਅਹਿ ਜੇ ਰਹਣਾ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: neet neet ghar baandheeeh je rahanaa hoee |
lines.english: Go ahead and build your houses, if you think you will stay here forever and ever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿੰਡੁ ਪਵੈ ਜੀਉ ਚਲਸੀ ਜੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਕੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: pindd pavai jeeo chalasee je jaanai koee |2|
lines.english: The body shall fall, and the soul shall depart; if only they knew this. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧਾ ਪਿਟਿਹੁ ਭਾਈਹੋ ਤੁਮੑ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhandhaa pittihu bhaaeeho tuma koorr kamaavahu |
lines.english: You are engrossed in worldly entanglements, O Siblings of Destiny, and you are practicing falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਰੋਵਹੁਗੇ ਓਸ ਨੋ ਤੁਮੑ ਕਉ ਕਉਣੁ ਰੋਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tum rovahuge os no tuma kau kaun roee |3|
lines.english: You mourn for that person, but who will mourn for you? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਸੁਤਾ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਾਗਾਏ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis te sutaa naanakaa jaagaae soee |
lines.english: Only the Lord, who causes the mortal to sleep, O Nanak, can awaken him again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਨ ਸੁਣਈ ਕਤ ਹੀ ਤੁਮੑ ਲੋਕ ਸੁਣਾਵਹੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: ohu na sunee kat hee tuma lok sunaavahu |4|
lines.english: The dead person does not hear anything at all; your cries are heard only by other people. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਘਰੁ ਬੂਝੈ ਆਪਣਾ ਤਾਂ ਨੀਦ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: je ghar boojhai aapanaa taan need na hoee |5|
lines.english: One who understands his true home, does not sleep. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਚਲਦਾ ਲੈ ਚਲਿਆ ਕਿਛੁ ਸੰਪੈ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: je chaladaa lai chaliaa kichh sanpai naale |
lines.english: If the departing mortal can take his wealth with him,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਹੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਕੈ ਬੂਝਹੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: taa dhan sanchahu dekh kai boojhahu beechaare |6|
lines.english: then go ahead and gather wealth yourself. See this, reflect upon it, and understand. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਣਜੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਮਖਸੂਦੁ ਲੈਹੁ ਮਤ ਪਛੋਤਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: vanaj karahu makhasood laihu mat pachhotaavahu |
lines.english: Make your deals, and obtain the true merchandise, or else you shall regret it later.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗਣ ਛੋਡਹੁ ਗੁਣ ਕਰਹੁ ਐਸੇ ਤਤੁ ਪਰਾਵਹੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: aaugan chhoddahu gun karahu aise tat paraavahu |7|
lines.english: Abandon your vices, and practice virtue, and you shall obtain the essence of reality. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮੁ ਭੂਮਿ ਸਤੁ ਬੀਜੁ ਕਰਿ ਐਸੀ ਕਿਰਸ ਕਮਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: dharam bhoom sat beej kar aisee kiras kamaavahu |
lines.english: Plant the seed of Truth in the soil of Dharmic faith, and practice such farming.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: karam hovai satigur milai boojhai beechaaraa |
lines.english: If the Lord shows His Mercy, one meets the True Guru; contemplating Him, one comes to understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਂ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਜਾਣੀਅਹੁ ਲਾਹਾ ਲੈ ਜਾਵਹੁ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: taan vaapaaree jaaneeahu laahaa lai jaavahu |8|
lines.english: Only then will you be known as a merchant, if you take your profits with you. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਲਾਹਾ ਤੋਟਾ ਤਿਵੈ ਵਾਟ ਚਲਦੀ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: jiau laahaa tottaa tivai vaatt chaladee aaee |
lines.english: As is the profit, so is the loss; this is the way of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਸੁਣੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਬਿਉਹਾਰਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: naam vakhaanai sune naam naame biauhaaraa |9|
lines.english: Then, one chants the Naam, hears the Naam, and deals only in the Naam. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਕੁੰਡਾ ਢੂਢੀਆ ਕੋ ਨੀਮੑੀ ਮੈਡਾ ॥
lines.translit: chaare kunddaa dtoodteea ko neemaee maiddaa |
lines.english: I have searched in the four directions, but no one is mine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸਾਈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੧੦॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai naanakaa saaee vaddiaaee |10|13|
lines.english: Whatever pleases His Will, O Nanak, is glory for me. ||10||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਕੋ ਮੈਡਾ ਤੂ ਧਣੀ ਸਾਚਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hiko maiddaa too dhanee saachaa mukh naam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are my only Lord; Your True Name is in my mouth. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰੁ ਬੀਭਾ ਮੈ ਨੀਮੑਿ ਕੋ ਕੈ ਕਰੀ ਸਲਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: dar beebhaa mai neema ko kai karee salaam |
lines.english: There is no other door for me; where shall I go to worship?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸਾਹਿਬਾ ਤੂ ਮੈ ਹਉ ਤੈਡਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: je tudh bhaavai saahibaa too mai hau taiddaa |1|
lines.english: If it pleases You, O Lord Master, then You are mine, and I am Yours. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧਾ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਸਿਧ ਪੀਰ ਮਾਗਹਿ ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: sidhaa sevan sidh peer maageh ridh sidh |
lines.english: Some serve the Siddhas, the beings of spiritual perfection, and some serve spiritual teachers; they beg for wealth and miraculous powers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਇਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਸਾਚੇ ਗੁਰ ਬੁਧਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mai ik naam na veesarai saache gur budh |2|
lines.english: May I never forget the Naam, the Name of the One Lord. This is the wisdom of the True Guru. ||2||
